tool.name: detectSeq
tool.description: Executes a genome-wide assessment of off-target effects associated with cytosine base editors (CBEs)

param.name: input_folder
param.label: path of the directory containing the fastq files

param.name: genome_folder
param.label: path of the directory containing the genome fasta file and the index (if already obtained)

param.name: output_folder
param.label: path of the directory in which the outputs will be saved
